title: Display Report Folder Column in Metrics Analyst Dashboard Selector
story: As a data analyst, I want to see the report folder name as a column when selecting dashboards in Metrics Analyst, so that I can distinguish between dashboards with the same name stored in different folders.
description:
When loading Metrics Analyst, users may encounter multiple dashboards with identical names. Adding a report folder column to the dashboard selector table helps users identify which dashboard to choose.

### Problem
Dashboard names in Salesforce are not unique. Users selecting a dashboard for analysis have no way to tell duplicates apart.

### Solution
Add a "Report Folder" column to the dashboard selection table that displays the folder path where each dashboard is stored.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard selector table displays a Report Folder column
Report folder value is populated from Salesforce report folder metadata
Users can distinguish between identically named dashboards by folder
ux_changes: Adds a Report Folder column to the Metrics Analyst dashboard selection table, allowing users to differentiate dashboards with identical names.
middleware_changes: Fetches and includes the report folder path in the dashboard list query results.
implementation_notes: Deployed to production. Report folder data sourced from Salesforce dashboard metadata.
comment_summary: Waqar confirmed the feature was deployed to production.
